LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT PAUL NORONHA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND FOR LEAVE TO FILE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO ATTACH PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING, SEE CCP 473 (B). MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT PAUL NORONHA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND FOR LEAVE TO FILE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO ATTACH PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING,
SEE CCP 473 (B). Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
